title: puccinellia holmbergii
intro: Puccinellia holmbergii, also known as Holmberg's wheat grass or Holmberg's grass, is a type of grass-like plant species belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Puccinellia holmbergii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Puccinellia holmbergii is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be consumed as a raw plant or used in herbal infusions.
